raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX XXXX my XXXX XXXX credit card issued by Citibank was XXXX used for a total of XXXX purchases. XXXX of those purchases ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ) was reversed and a permanent credit was issued. Another XXXX at Been Verified in the amount of {$1.00} and {$4.00} were listed as being withdrawn by me. I did not withdraw those charges. That being said, after contacting the company, they are reversing the charges. There are XXXX remaining disputed charges. There were XXXX purchases made at XXXX ( whom I have a monthly cell phone service with ) for {$90.00} and {$300.00}. Another was for XXXX XXXX in the amount of {$140.00}. Those XXXX amounts were initially credited back to my account and then they were reversed with Citibank advising me that I was responsible. I believe the XXXX charges were because I told them I have a relationship with that company. That being said, the monthly invoice is deducted directly from my XXXX checking account and has never exceeded {$54.00}. I contacted XXXX and XXXX XXXX and using the credit card number that has since been replaced, they were unable to locate those charges.
